changeSet.author: Hromov
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dbo.[user] (nickname, name, surname, email, password_hash) VALUES ('super_corg', 'Ivan', 'Hromov', 'ivan.hromov@nure.ua', '$2a$12$R9h/lSAbvvZAs67BRUM76uYtDfAgzO.6v.hY.K/6vK6V9F0vLqFmq'), ('graph_master', 'Maryna', 'Cherevko', 'maryna.cherevko@nure.ua', '$2a$12$QwErTyUiOpAsDfGhJkLlZzXcVbNnMm1234567890AzByCxDwEvFu'), ('coder_007', 'Mykyta', 'Shvets', 'mykyta.shvets@nure.ua', '$2a$12$KixSscS8D6Uv3p3vW4.2fO.hY.K/6vK6V9F0vLqFmqR9h/lSAbvvZ'), ('dev_guru', 'Sofiia', 'Khapal', 'sofiia.khapal@nure.ua', '$2a$12$L7mXp9Q2wE4r5T6y7U8i9o0P1a2S3d4F5g6H7j8K9l0M1n2B3v4C5'), ('cyber_user', 'Darya', 'Kravets', 'kravets.d@nure.ua', '$2a$12$Z1x2C3v4B5n6M7m8L9k0J9h8G7f6D5s4A3p2O1i0U9y8T7r6E5w4'), ('coder_01', 'Oksana', 'Panchenko', 'panchenko.o@nure.ua', '$2a$12$P0o9I8u7Y6t5R4e3W2q1A1s2D3f4G5h6J7k8L9z0X9c8V7b6N5m4'), ('tech_lead', 'Viktor', 'Moroz', 'moroz.v@nure.ua', '$2a$12$M1n2B3v4C5x6Z7l8K9j0H1g2F3d4S5a6P7o8I9u0Y1t2R3e4W5q6'), ('db_admin', 'Iryna', 'Shevchenko', 'shevchenko.i@nure.ua', '$2a$12$B3v4C5x6Z7m8L9k0J1h2G3f4D5s6A7p8O9i0U1y2T3r4E5w6Q7z8'), ('frontend_cat', 'Max', 'Klymenko', 'klymenko.m@nure.ua', '$2a$12$X6z7L8k9J0h1G2f3D4s5A6p7O8i9U0y1T2r3E4w5Q6z7X8c9V0b1'), ('backend_dog', 'Serhiy', 'Tkachenko', 'tkachenko.s@nure.ua', '$2a$12$V0b1N2m3M4l5K6j7H8g9G0f1D2s3A4p5O6i7U8y9T0r1E2w3Q4z5'), ('qa_tester', 'Olena', 'Lytvyn', 'lytvyn.o@nure.ua', '$2a$12$N2m3M4l5K6j7H8g9G0f1D2s3A4p5O6i7U8y9T0r1E2w3Q4z5S6x7'), ('pm_manager', 'Dmytro', 'Rudenko', 'rudenko.d@nure.ua', '$2a$12$K6j7H8g9G0f1D2s3A4p5O6i7U8y9T0r1E2w3Q4z5S6x7D8c9F0v1'), ('analyst_pro', 'Svitlana', 'Melnyk', 'melnyk.s@nure.ua', '$2a$12$G0f1D2s3A4p5O6i7U8y9T0r1E2w3Q4z5S6x7D8c9F0v1G2h3J4k5'), ('security_pro', 'Artem', 'Boyko', 'boyko.a@nure.ua', '$2a$12$D2s3A4p5O6i7U8y9T0r1E2w3Q4z5S6x7D8c9F0v1G2h3J4k5L6m7'), ('student_nure', 'Yana', 'Kovalenko', 'kovalenko.y@nure.ua', '$2a$12$A4p5O6i7U8y9T0r1E2w3Q4z5S6x7D8c9F0v1G2h3J4k5L6m7N8b9');
